name: mb_imiss
m5_band: miss-driven CPI >= 1.30 AND abs-cyc within tightened tol vs golden
note: I-cache-miss cycle check. Each body instruction is forced onto its own 32-byte line (.p2align 5); the body spans 400 lines >> 256-line 8KB/2-way I-cache, so each loop pass re-fetches evicted lines (50% steady-state I-miss), each adding imiss=8 cycles -> CPI~6.0. No data accesses (0 D-cache traffic). p5trace.so golden: icache_miss 50.01%, dcache 0, misalign 0.
